articles.title: My Cameron Carr thoughts after first SL game.
articles.original_title: My Cameron Carr thoughts after first SL game.
articles.summary: I know it is just SL and guys are not in full NBA shape nor have they much playing time together. So it was rough on a few of them (Adou) but for others like Carr it was like a stroll in the park. My biggest takeaway is how smooth he is playing. Nothing hysterical or too chaotic for him. His passes were on the money and smooth. His 3 point shooting was smooth and accurate.  I really liked what I saw in his first game and am excited to see more of him going forward.    submitted by    /u/

articles.title: Rich Paul Updates Timeline for LeBron's Free‑Agency Decision
articles.original_title: Rich Paul gives an update on when LeBron James will make free agency decision - Fear The Sword
articles.summary: Agent Rich Paul told reporters that LeBron James will make his free‑agency choice later this summer, after a series of private meetings with interested teams. Paul emphasized that the decision will be made once James has completed his health assessments and evaluated all options.
key_points: LeBron’s decision is expected later in the summer, not immediately.
Health evaluations and team meetings are still ongoing.
Rich Paul will continue to serve as the primary point of contact for updates.

articles.title: Bleacher Report: Updated Timeline for LeBron After Revealing Preferred Destinations
articles.original_title: LeBron James' Decision Timeline Updated by Rich Paul After Revealing Top NBA Landing Spots - Bleacher Report
articles.summary: Rich Paul provided a revised schedule for LeBron James’s free‑agency process, noting that the star has narrowed his list to a few top landing spots. The timeline now includes additional scouting trips and private discussions before a final decision is announced.
key_points: LeBron has identified several preferred teams.
The decision timeline has been pushed back to allow more thorough evaluation.
Private meetings and scouting trips are slated for the coming weeks.

articles.title: Timberwolves Pitch Simple Offer to LeBron James
articles.original_title: Timberwolves have a simple pitch for LeBron James, and there's a chance it works - CBS Sports
articles.summary: CBS Sports reports that Minnesota’s front office is presenting LeBron James with a straightforward proposal: a veteran‑friendly contract and a clear role in a young, up‑and‑coming roster. The team hopes the simplicity of the pitch could sway James toward Minnesota.
key_points: Offer focuses on a veteran‑minimum deal with a defined role.
Timberwolves highlight their young core and potential for immediate impact.
The pitch aims to differentiate from more complex proposals from other clubs.

articles.title: Celtics Still in LeBron Conversation, Says Rich Paul
articles.original_title: Fireworks, anyone?: Rich Paul doesn’t rule out LeBron James joining the Celtics just yet - CelticsBlog
articles.summary: According to CelticsBlog, Rich Paul has not ruled out a possible move for LeBron James to Boston, keeping the Celtics in the mix as negotiations continue. Paul noted that the Celtics remain a viable option pending further discussions and health updates.
key_points: Boston remains a potential destination for LeBron.
Rich Paul emphasizes that no decision has been made yet.
Final choice will depend on health reports and contract terms.

articles.title: Yahoo Sports: Paul Suggests LeBron Could Thrive in Dallas
articles.original_title: Rich Paul makes surprising case for LeBron James to join Dallas Mavericks - Yahoo Sports
articles.summary: Yahoo Sports highlights an unexpected argument from Rich Paul that Dallas Mavericks could be a strong fit for LeBron James, citing the team's recent roster moves and market appeal. Paul points to the Mavericks’ competitive window and the chance for James to mentor emerging talent.
key_points: Dallas offers a competitive roster and a growing market.
LeBron could play a mentorship role for young Mavericks players.
The proposal is presented as a strategic alternative to traditional suitors.
